ayat.arabic_uthmani: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ إِذَا ٱلسَّمَآءُ ٱنفَطَرَتْ
ayat.english: When the heaven is cleft asunder,
When the seas are poured forth,
A soul will know what it hath sent before (it) and what left behind.

ayat.arabic_uthmani: يَـٰٓأَيُّهَا ٱلْإِنسَـٰنُ مَا غَرَّكَ بِرَبِّكَ ٱلْكَرِيمِ
ayat.english: O man! What hath made thee careless concerning thy Lord, the Bountiful,
Who created thee, then fashioned, then proportioned thee?

ayat.arabic_uthmani: فِىٓ أَىِّ صُورَةٍ مَّا شَآءَ رَكَّبَكَ
ayat.english: Into whatsoever form He will, He casteth thee.
Nay, but ye deny the Judgment.
Lo! there are above you guardians,
Lo! the righteous verily will be in delight.
And lo! the wicked verily will be in hell;
They will burn therein on the Day of Judgment,
And will not be absent thence.
Ah, what will convey unto thee what the Day of Judgment is!

ayat.arabic_uthmani: ثُمَّ مَآ أَدْرَىٰكَ مَا يَوْمُ ٱلدِّينِ
ayat.english: Again, what will convey unto thee what the Day of Judgment is!

ayat.arabic_uthmani: يَوْمَ لَا تَمْلِكُ نَفْسٌ لِّنَفْسٍ شَيْـًٔا ۖ وَٱلْأَمْرُ يَوْمَئِذٍ لِّلَّهِ
ayat.english: A day on which no soul hath power at all for any (other) soul. The (absolute) command on that day is Allah's.
